ddls:
CREATE TABLE "laptops" (
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laptop */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the laptop company */,
  "product" TEXT /* Product name or model of the laptop */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Type of laptop (e.g., Ultrabook, Notebook) */,
  "inches" REAL /* Screen size in inches */,
  "cpu" TEXT /* CPU model and speed */,
  "ram" TEXT /* RAM size */,
  "gpu" TEXT /* GPU model */,
  "op_sys" TEXT /* Operating system */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the laptop in kilograms */,
  "price_euros" REAL /* Price of the laptop in euros */,
  "cpu_company" TEXT /* CPU manufacturer */,
  "memory_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of memory (storage) in GB */,
  "memory_type" TEXT /* Type of memory (e.g., SSD, HDD) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the laptop */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the laptop is stocked */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of laptops in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  "laptop_image" TEXT /* Image of the laptop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the laptop */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the laptop */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laptop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laptops_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laptops_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the branch */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the branch */,
  "working_hours" TEXT /* Working hours of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop sold */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of laptops sold */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale in euros */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who processed the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Cash, Credit Card) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied (in %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program the customer is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespeople" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "salesperson_name" TEXT /* Full name of the salesperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the salesperson works */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the salesperson (e.g., Sales Associate, Manager) */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Manager, Sales Associate) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the user works */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order in euros */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of laptops ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the laptop in euros */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
